sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112659" key="fu/rsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φύρ-σις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112659.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixing, kneading,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλεύρου καὶ ὕδατος</foreign> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0022.tlg002:p.215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.215</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
